workflows.title: Digest uploads into memory
workflows.description: Digest each uploaded file into the Hub's memory, then refresh MEMORY.md.
workflows.hint: Drop files into uploads/ · digested into memory/.

workflows.title: File uploads into collections
workflows.description: Classify & digest each dropped file, draft glossary definitions for its unknown terms, then file it into a KB collection — you review the drafts first.
workflows.hint: Drop files into uploads/ · scope them in uploads/input.json.

workflows.title: Consolidate memory
workflows.description: Re-read current memory and recent chats, then rewrite the memory files — dedupe, merge, drop stale.
workflows.hint: Runs on the Hub's existing memory — no inputs needed.
